sentences.arabic: يَصِلُ أَحْمَدُ إِلَى الْمَكْتَبِ فِي السَّاعَةِ الثَّامِنَةِ صَبَاحًا.
sentences.translation: Ahmed stiže u kancelariju u osam sati ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmad arrives at the office at eight o'clock in the morning.

sentences.arabic: يَشْرَبُ الْقَهْوَةَ وَيَبْدَأُ فِي قِرَاءَةِ رَسَائِلِ الْبَرِيدِ الْإِلِكْتُرُونِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Pije kafu i počinje čitati poruke e-pošte.
sentences.translationEn: He drinks coffee and starts reading his emails.

sentences.arabic: يَجْتَمِعُ مَعَ فَرِيقِهِ لِمُنَاقَشَةِ الْمَشْرُوعِ الْجَدِيدِ.
sentences.translation: Sastaje se sa svojim timom kako bi razgovarali o novom projektu.
sentences.translationEn: He meets with his team to discuss the new project.

sentences.arabic: يَعْمَلُ الْجَمِيعُ بِاجْتِهَادٍ لِتَحْقِيقِ الْأَهْدَافِ الْمُشْتَرَكَةِ.
sentences.translation: Svi naporno rade na postizanju zajedničkih ciljeva.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone works hard to achieve the common goals.
